problem id: abda193b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01111001 -> 10001111
  00100000 -> 01111111
  10101100 -> 10001111
  01100011 -> 01000110
  00111010 -> 10110111
  00101011 -> 11100011
  10000001 -> 11101001
  00110101 -> 01111011
  01000101 -> 10111110

query: 01111100
predicted answer: 11001111
